title: AI Ancient Statue
description: Reimagines a photo as a museum-quality marble or bronze statue.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into an ancient museum statue. Preserve the number of people, recognizable facial structure, pose, camera angle, framing, and main composition. Recreate the subject as carved marble or aged bronze with realistic chisel detail, subtle patina, museum-gallery lighting, classical sculptural dignity, and a clean plinth or gallery setting. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted face, malformed anatomy, extra limbs, broken sculpture, melted material, plastic, low quality, blurry, cartoon, modern clothing texture left unchanged, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. white marble statue, bronze museum sculpture...
